title: POSUGEAR Headphone Adapter jack 6.35mm (1/4 inch) to 3.5mm (1/8 inch)-2 Pack, 1/4 inch to 3.5mm Headphone Audio Jack Plug Adaptor Gold Plated-2 Pack
features: Consistent Sound Quality: Are you still worried about noise and disconnection? Then our audio jack adapter is your best choice. After thousands of sound quality inspections and connection tests, we have achieved lossless signal transmission and perfect sound quality restoration

24K Pure Copper Gold Plated: POSUGEAR headphone adapter jack adopts solid brass material and surface gold plating process, high density shielding interference, stable signal transmission, anti-corrosion, greatly improving the service life

Perfectly Fitting Internal Connections: The female head of 3.5mm to 6.35mm jack adapter adopts a well-designed screw structure, which can lock the plug firmly, and the male head has strong grip and smooth insertion, which can keep the connection no matter how the device is moved, bringing more stable audio transmission and better user experience

Extensive Compatibility: Our audio adaptors work with all devices with 1/4 inch Male and 1/8 inch Female Audio Plug, including mixers, electric guitars, electric keyboards, electric pianos, AV receivers, DACs, Dolby Atmos receivers suitable for recording studios, concerts and other occasions
What You Will Get: Professional POSUGEAR headphone adapter *1, Beautiful packaging bag *1.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Previous page Next page 1 24K Gold Plated 2 Non-slip design Easy to Use 6.35mm to 3.5mm stereo audio adapter allows you to connect your headphones or microphones with 1/8 inch plugs to audio devices such as home audio, amplifiers, guitar and piano with 1/4 inch stereo jack. Use Anywhere The aux adapter has a mini size and can be placed anywhere in a handbag, pocket, purse, etc. It can be used at any time, very convenient, Plug and Play.
